---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
description: "Publications by Mesfin Genie in health economics, choice modelling, behavioural decision science and public health policy."
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell}
# Publications

Journal articles, working papers, a book chapter and data outputs.
:::
:::

::: {.section-tight}
::: {.page-shell}
::: {.publication-summary}
<span><strong>44</strong> research outputs</span>
[Google Scholar ↗](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {#publication-tools .publication-tools-host}
:::

::: {#publication-empty .publication-empty hidden="hidden"}
No publications match the selected filters.
:::

::: {.publication-type-section data-publication-section="journal"}
## Journal articles

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2026"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2026
<span>15 articles</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 guidance or misdirection? unpacking the role of feedback in health preference assessments mesfin g. genie; shelby d. reed; semra ozdemir health economics , 35, 910–928 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Guidance or Misdirection? Unpacking the Role of Feedback in Health Preference Assessments](https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.70093){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Shelby D. Reed; Semra Ozdemir</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Economics* , 35, 910–928 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.70093){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 community first or my body first? moral values and vaccine mandate preferences mesfin genie; fabio i. martinenghi; francesco paolucci; jonathan lake; katie attwell; christopher c. blyth; margie danchin; teresa gavaruzzi; udo evers australian and new zealand journal of public health , 50, 100496 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Community First or My Body First? Moral Values and Vaccine Mandate Preferences](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100496){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin Genie**; Fabio I. Martinenghi; Francesco Paolucci; Jonathan Lake; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth; Margie Danchin; Teresa Gavaruzzi; Udo Evers</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Australian and New Zealand Journal of Public Health* , 50, 100496 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100496){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 no jab, no access? preferences for vaccine mandates in europe and australia mesfin genie; fabio i. martinenghi; francesco paolucci; jonathan lake; katie attwell; christopher c. blyth; jessica kaufman; margie danchin; jeremy k. ward; teresa gavaruzzi australian and new zealand journal of public health , 50, 100450 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [No Jab, No Access? Preferences for Vaccine Mandates in Europe and Australia](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100450){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin Genie**; Fabio I. Martinenghi; Francesco Paolucci; Jonathan Lake; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth; Jessica Kaufman; Margie Danchin; Jeremy K. Ward; Teresa Gavaruzzi</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Australian and New Zealand Journal of Public Health* , 50, 100450 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100450){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 priority for self or others? incorporating equity considerations in a preference-based health value assessment mesfin g. genie; surachat ngorsuraches value in health , 29, 467–475 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Priority for Self or Others? Incorporating Equity Considerations in a Preference-Based Health Value Assessment](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.10.011){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Value in Health* , 29, 467–475 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.10.011){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 jabs or societal restrictions? public preferences for vaccination programmes in south africa aregawi g. gebremariam; mesfin g. genie; beidemaryam wondwosen admasu; d. abegaz; j. g. gatua; surachat ngorsuraches; francesco paolucci health policy and technology , 15, 101195 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Jabs or Societal Restrictions? Public Preferences for Vaccination Programmes in South Africa](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101195){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Beidemaryam Wondwosen Admasu; D. Abegaz; J. G. Gatua; Surachat Ngorsuraches; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 15, 101195 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101195){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 jabs and lockdowns: public preferences for vaccination programmes in chile stefano bruzzo-gallardo; josefa henriquez; mesfin g. genie health policy and technology , 15, 101196 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Jabs and Lockdowns: Public Preferences for Vaccination Programmes in Chile](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101196){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Stefano Bruzzo-Gallardo; Josefa Henriquez; **Mesfin G. Genie**</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 15, 101196 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101196){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 vaccine uptake in the context of mandate announcement and removal: evidence from europe and north america aregawi g. gebremariam; mesfin genie; huong le; annette k. regan; frank h. beard; kristine macartney; francesco paolucci; hannah c. moore; katie attwell; christopher c. blyth vaccine , 88, 128825 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Vaccine Uptake in the Context of Mandate Announcement and Removal: Evidence from Europe and North America](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128825){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; **Mesfin Genie**; Huong Le; Annette K. Regan; Frank H. Beard; Kristine Macartney; Francesco Paolucci; Hannah C. Moore; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Vaccine* , 88, 128825 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128825){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 fit for purpose? assessing the robustness of discrete choice experiment designs in the context of evolving health technologies mesfin g. genie; verity watson; michaël schwarzinger; stéphane luchini social science &amp; medicine , 404, 119463 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Fit for Purpose? Assessing the Robustness of Discrete Choice Experiment Designs in the Context of Evolving Health Technologies](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2026.119463){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Verity Watson; Michaël Schwarzinger; Stéphane Luchini</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Social Science & Medicine* , 404, 119463 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2026.119463){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 time preferences and covid-19 vaccination uptake arthur e. attema; marcello antonini; mesfin genie; aleksandra torbica; francesco paolucci the european journal of health economics , 27, 47–63 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Time Preferences and COVID-19 Vaccination Uptake](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10198-025-01801-7){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Arthur E. Attema; Marcello Antonini; **Mesfin Genie**; Aleksandra Torbica; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*The European Journal of Health Economics* , 27, 47–63 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10198-025-01801-7){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="other" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 immigration and preventive care utilization in europe: evidence from retrospective data raluca elena buia; mesfin genie; cristina elisa orso; giacomo pasini empirical economics , 70 · published other applied economics journal article"}
#### [Immigration and Preventive Care Utilization in Europe: Evidence from Retrospective Data](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00181-026-02928-z){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Raluca Elena Buia; **Mesfin Genie**; Cristina Elisa Orso; Giacomo Pasini</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Empirical Economics* , 70 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00181-026-02928-z){.pub-link target="_blank"} · [Earlier version ↗](https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.4269083){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 shots or shutdowns? public preferences for covid-19 vaccines and societal restrictions in the us ibrahim alfayoumi; mesfin g. genie; surachat ngorsuraches health policy and technology , 15, 101152 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Shots or Shutdowns? Public Preferences for COVID-19 Vaccines and Societal Restrictions in the US](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2025.101152){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Ibrahim Alfayoumi; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 15, 101152 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2025.101152){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 understanding vaccine acceptance through construal-level theory of psychological distance: evidence from singapore and south korea yevgen bogodistov; mesfin genie; ayman fouda health policy and technology , 15, 101148 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Understanding Vaccine Acceptance through Construal-Level Theory of Psychological Distance: Evidence from Singapore and South Korea](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2025.101148){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Yevgen Bogodistov; **Mesfin Genie**; Ayman Fouda</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 15, 101148 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2025.101148){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 feeling lonely? preferences for support programmes to reduce loneliness among older adults in australia: a discrete choice experiment mesfin g. genie; allison w. boyes; francesco paolucci health policy , 167, 105587 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Feeling Lonely? Preferences for Support Programmes to Reduce Loneliness among Older Adults in Australia: A Discrete Choice Experiment](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.healthpol.2026.105587){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Allison W. Boyes; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy* , 167, 105587 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.healthpol.2026.105587){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 vaccination policies and hesitancy: preferences, trade-offs and future challenges chiara berardi; ayman fouda; mesfin genie; aleksandra torbica health policy and technology , 15, 101246 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Vaccination Policies and Hesitancy: Preferences, Trade-offs and Future Challenges](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101246){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Chiara Berardi; Ayman Fouda; **Mesfin Genie**; Aleksandra Torbica</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 15, 101246 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101246){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2026" data-type="journal" data-search="2026 an open repository of covid-19 vaccine mandate studies with a worked scoping review of quasi-experimental evidence fabio i. martinenghi; tushar p. ojha; anaïs thomasson; bianca devsam; sarah drislane; stavros vasiliadis; chiara berardi; aregawi gebremariam; arianna dipalma; teresa gavaruzzi; jeremy k. ward; francesco paolucci; margie danchin; mesfin genie; katie attwell; christopher c. blyth npj vaccines , 11, 01454 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [An Open Repository of COVID-19 Vaccine Mandate Studies with a Worked Scoping Review of Quasi-experimental Evidence](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41541-026-01454-4){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Fabio I. Martinenghi; Tushar P. Ojha; Anaïs Thomasson; Bianca Devsam; Sarah Drislane; Stavros Vasiliadis; Chiara Berardi; Aregawi Gebremariam; Arianna Dipalma; Teresa Gavaruzzi; Jeremy K. Ward; Francesco Paolucci; Margie Danchin; **Mesfin Genie**; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*npj Vaccines* , 11, 01454 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41541-026-01454-4){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2025"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2025
<span>5 articles</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2025" data-type="journal" data-search="2025 democracy, trust, and political orientation: disentangling mechanisms shaping individuals’ vaccine attitudes mesfin genie journal of health politics, policy and law · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Democracy, Trust, and Political Orientation: Disentangling Mechanisms Shaping Individuals’ Vaccine Attitudes](https://doi.org/10.1215/03616878-12166725){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin Genie**</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Journal of Health Politics, Policy and Law* · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1215/03616878-12166725){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2025" data-type="journal" data-search="2025 are we ready for the next pandemic? public preferences and trade-offs between vaccine characteristics and societal restrictions across 21 countries marcello antonini; mesfin g. genie; katie attwell; arthur e. attema; jeremy k. ward; alessia melegaro; aleksandra torbica; brian kelly; chiara berardi; ana rita sequeira; n. mcgregor; a. kellner; shuli brammli-greenberg; madeleine hinwood; l. murauskiene; daiga behmane; zsolt j. balogh; terje p. hagen; francesco paolucci social science &amp; medicine , 366, 117687 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Are We Ready for the Next Pandemic? Public Preferences and Trade-offs between Vaccine Characteristics and Societal Restrictions across 21 Countries](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2025.117687){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Marcello Antonini; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Katie Attwell; Arthur E. Attema; Jeremy K. Ward; Alessia Melegaro; Aleksandra Torbica; Brian Kelly; Chiara Berardi; Ana Rita Sequeira; N. McGregor; A. Kellner; Shuli Brammli-Greenberg; Madeleine Hinwood; L. Murauskiene; Daiga Behmane; Zsolt J. Balogh; Terje P. Hagen; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Social Science & Medicine* , 366, 117687 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2025.117687){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2025" data-type="journal" data-search="2025 important continuous glucose monitoring attributes for patients with type 2 diabetes tim c. lai; heather p. whitley; mesfin genie; robert h. eckel; surachat ngorsuraches clinical diabetes , 43, 670–680 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Important Continuous Glucose Monitoring Attributes for Patients with Type 2 Diabetes](https://doi.org/10.2337/cd25-0047){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Tim C. Lai; Heather P. Whitley; **Mesfin Genie**; Robert H. Eckel; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Clinical Diabetes* , 43, 670–680 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.2337/cd25-0047){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2025" data-type="journal" data-search="2025 patients’ preferences for cytoreductive treatments in newly diagnosed metastatic prostate cancer: the ip5-matter study martin j. connor; mesfin genie; tim dudderidge; hangjian wu; johanna sukumar; mark beresford; diletta bianchini; c. goh; g. horan; p. innominato; v. khoo; n. klimowska-nassar; s. madaan; s. mangar; s. mccracken; p. ostler; s. paisey; a. robinson; b. rai; n. sarwar; n. srihari; k. t. jayaprakash; m. varughese; m. winkler; hashim u. ahmed; verity watson european urology oncology , 8, 663–673 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Patients’ Preferences for Cytoreductive Treatments in Newly Diagnosed Metastatic Prostate Cancer: The IP5-MATTER Study](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.euo.2024.06.010){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Martin J. Connor; **Mesfin Genie**; Tim Dudderidge; Hangjian Wu; Johanna Sukumar; Mark Beresford; Diletta Bianchini; C. Goh; G. Horan; P. Innominato; V. Khoo; N. Klimowska-Nassar; S. Madaan; S. Mangar; S. McCracken; P. Ostler; S. Paisey; A. Robinson; B. Rai; N. Sarwar; N. Srihari; K. T. Jayaprakash; M. Varughese; M. Winkler; Hashim U. Ahmed; Verity Watson</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*European Urology Oncology* , 8, 663–673 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.euo.2024.06.010){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2025" data-type="journal" data-search="2025 impact of vaccine mandates and removals on covid-19 vaccine uptake in australia and international comparators: a study protocol aregawi g. gebremariam; mesfin genie; huong le; katie attwell; bette liu; annette k. regan; frank h. beard; kristine macartney; francesco paolucci; hannah c. moore; christopher c. blyth bmj open , 15, e097412 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Impact of Vaccine Mandates and Removals on COVID-19 Vaccine Uptake in Australia and International Comparators: A Study Protocol](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2024-097412){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; **Mesfin Genie**; Huong Le; Katie Attwell; Bette Liu; Annette K. Regan; Frank H. Beard; Kristine Macartney; Francesco Paolucci; Hannah C. Moore; Christopher C. Blyth</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*BMJ Open* , 15, e097412 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2024-097412){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2024"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2024
<span>7 articles</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2024" data-type="journal" data-search="2024 doctor of pharmacy students’ preferences for the attributes of a pharmacoeconomics workshop: a discrete choice experiment surachat ngorsuraches; mesfin genie; anna solomon american journal of pharmaceutical education , 88, 101089 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Doctor of Pharmacy Students’ Preferences for the Attributes of a Pharmacoeconomics Workshop: A Discrete Choice Experiment](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ajpe.2024.101089){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Surachat Ngorsuraches; **Mesfin Genie**; Anna Solomon</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*American Journal of Pharmaceutical Education* , 88, 101089 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ajpe.2024.101089){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2024" data-type="journal" data-search="2024 choice consistency in discrete choice experiments: does numeracy skill matter? mesfin g. genie; nabin poudel; francesco paolucci; surachat ngorsuraches value in health , 27, 1594–1604 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Choice Consistency in Discrete Choice Experiments: Does Numeracy Skill Matter?](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.07.001){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Nabin Poudel; Francesco Paolucci; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Value in Health* , 27, 1594–1604 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.07.001){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2024" data-type="journal" data-search="2024 political determinants of covid-19 restrictions and vaccine rollouts: the case of regional elections in italy and spain pablo arija prieto; marcello antonini; mehdi ammi; mesfin genie; francesco paolucci health policy , 145, 105082 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Political Determinants of COVID-19 Restrictions and Vaccine Rollouts: The Case of Regional Elections in Italy and Spain](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.healthpol.2024.105082){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Pablo Arija Prieto; Marcello Antonini; Mehdi Ammi; **Mesfin Genie**; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy* , 145, 105082 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.healthpol.2024.105082){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2024" data-type="journal" data-search="2024 public preferences for vaccination campaigns in the covid-19 endemic phase: insights from the vaxpref database marcello antonini; mesfin g. genie; arthur e. attema; katie attwell; zsolt j. balogh; daiga behmane; chiara berardi; shuli brammli-greenberg; andrew greenland; terje p. hagen; madeleine hinwood; c. james; a. kellner; brian kelly; l. murauskiene; n. mcgregor; alessia melegaro; n. moy; ana rita sequeira; r. singh; aleksandra torbica; jeremy k. ward; d. yang; francesco paolucci health policy and technology , 13, 100849 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Public Preferences for Vaccination Campaigns in the COVID-19 Endemic Phase: Insights from the VaxPref Database](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2024.100849){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Marcello Antonini; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Arthur E. Attema; Katie Attwell; Zsolt J. Balogh; Daiga Behmane; Chiara Berardi; Shuli Brammli-Greenberg; Andrew Greenland; Terje P. Hagen; Madeleine Hinwood; C. James; A. Kellner; Brian Kelly; L. Murauskiene; N. McGregor; Alessia Melegaro; N. Moy; Ana Rita Sequeira; R. Singh; Aleksandra Torbica; Jeremy K. Ward; D. Yang; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 13, 100849 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2024.100849){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2024" data-type="journal" data-search="2024 willingness to participate in placebo-controlled surgical trials of the knee laura wall; samantha bunzli; elizabeth nelson; l. hawke; mesfin genie; madeleine hinwood; danielle lang; m. dowsey; p. clarke; p. choong; zsolt j. balogh; l. lohmander; francesco paolucci the bone &amp; joint journal , 106-b, 1408–1415 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Willingness to Participate in Placebo-Controlled Surgical Trials of the Knee](https://doi.org/10.1302/0301-620X.106B12.BJJ-2023-1266.R2){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Laura Wall; Samantha Bunzli; Elizabeth Nelson; L. Hawke; **Mesfin Genie**; Madeleine Hinwood; Danielle Lang; M. Dowsey; P. Clarke; P. Choong; Zsolt J. Balogh; L. Lohmander; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*The Bone & Joint Journal* , 106-B, 1408–1415 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1302/0301-620X.106B12.BJJ-2023-1266.R2){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2024" data-type="journal" data-search="2024 vaccine uptake and effectiveness: why some african countries performed better than others? aregawi g. gebremariam; d. abegaz; h. y. nigus; t. l. argaw; m. gerbaba; mesfin g. genie; francesco paolucci health policy and technology , 13, 100820 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Vaccine Uptake and Effectiveness: Why Some African Countries Performed Better than Others?](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2023.100820){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; D. Abegaz; H. Y. Nigus; T. L. Argaw; M. Gerbaba; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 13, 100820 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2023.100820){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2024" data-type="journal" data-search="2024 vaccination and non-pharmaceutical interventions during covid-19: impact on health and non-health outcomes in the us asmita p. khatiwada; mesfin g. genie; aregawi g. gebremariam; tim c. lai; nabin poudel; surachat ngorsuraches health policy and technology , 13, 100792 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Vaccination and Non-pharmaceutical Interventions during COVID-19: Impact on Health and Non-health Outcomes in the US](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2023.100792){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Asmita P. Khatiwada; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Aregawi G. Gebremariam; Tim C. Lai; Nabin Poudel; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 13, 100792 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2023.100792){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2023"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2023
<span>1 article</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2023" data-type="journal" data-search="2023 keeping an eye on cost: what can eye tracking tell us about attention to cost information in discrete choice experiments? mesfin g. genie; mandy ryan; nicolas krucien health economics , 32, 1101–1119 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Keeping an Eye on Cost: What Can Eye Tracking Tell Us about Attention to Cost Information in Discrete Choice Experiments?](https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.4658){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Mandy Ryan; Nicolas Krucien</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Economics* , 32, 1101–1119 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.4658){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2022"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2022
<span>4 articles</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="other" data-year="2022" data-type="journal" data-search="2022 how do renewable energy and urbanization cause carbon emissions? evidence from advanced panel estimation techniques y. sun; h. li; z. andlib; mesfin g. genie renewable energy , 185, 996–1005 · published other applied economics journal article"}
#### [How Do Renewable Energy and Urbanization Cause Carbon Emissions? Evidence from Advanced Panel Estimation Techniques](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.renene.2021.12.112){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Y. Sun; H. Li; Z. Andlib; **Mesfin G. Genie**</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Renewable Energy* , 185, 996–1005 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.renene.2021.12.112){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="other" data-year="2022" data-type="journal" data-search="2022 the role of solar energy and eco-innovation in reducing environmental degradation in china: evidence from a qardl approach f. chien; c.-c. hsu; z. andlib; m. i. shah; t. ajaz; mesfin g. genie integrated environmental assessment and management , 18, 555–571 · published other applied economics journal article"}
#### [The Role of Solar Energy and Eco-innovation in Reducing Environmental Degradation in China: Evidence from a QARDL Approach](https://doi.org/10.1002/ieam.4500){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">F. Chien; C.-C. Hsu; Z. Andlib; M. I. Shah; T. Ajaz; **Mesfin G. Genie**</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Integrated Environmental Assessment and Management* , 18, 555–571 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1002/ieam.4500){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2022" data-type="journal" data-search="2022 public acceptability of non-pharmaceutical interventions to control a pandemic in the uk: a discrete choice experiment luis e. loría-rebolledo; mandy ryan; verity watson; mesfin g. genie; ruben a. sakowsky; daniel powell; shantini paranjothy bmj open , 12, e054155 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Public Acceptability of Non-pharmaceutical Interventions to Control a Pandemic in the UK: A Discrete Choice Experiment](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2021-054155){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Luis E. Loría-Rebolledo; Mandy Ryan; Verity Watson; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Ruben A. Sakowsky; Daniel Powell; Shantini Paranjothy</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*BMJ Open* , 12, e054155 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2021-054155){.pub-link target="_blank"} · [Earlier version ↗](https://doi.org/10.1101/2021.10.12.21264883){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2022" data-type="journal" data-search="2022 a systematic review of patients’ values, preferences, and expectations for the treatment of metastatic prostate cancer martin j. connor; mesfin g. genie; david burns; e. j. bass; m. gonzalez; n. sarwar; a. falconer; s. mangar; t. dudderidge; v. khoo; m. winkler; hashim u. ahmed; verity watson european urology open science , 36, 9–18 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [A Systematic Review of Patients’ Values, Preferences, and Expectations for the Treatment of Metastatic Prostate Cancer](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.euros.2021.10.003){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Martin J. Connor; **Mesfin G. Genie**; David Burns; E. J. Bass; M. Gonzalez; N. Sarwar; A. Falconer; S. Mangar; T. Dudderidge; V. Khoo; M. Winkler; Hashim U. Ahmed; Verity Watson</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*European Urology Open Science* , 36, 9–18 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.euros.2021.10.003){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2021"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2021
<span>4 articles</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2021" data-type="journal" data-search="2021 to pay or not to pay? cost information processing in the valuation of publicly funded healthcare mesfin g. genie; mandy ryan; nicolas krucien social science &amp; medicine , 276, 113822 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [To Pay or Not to Pay? Cost Information Processing in the Valuation of Publicly Funded Healthcare](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2021.113822){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Mandy Ryan; Nicolas Krucien</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Social Science & Medicine* , 276, 113822 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2021.113822){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="other" data-year="2021" data-type="journal" data-search="2021 the trade-off between economic growth and environmental quality: does economic freedom asymmetry matter for pakistan? muhammad tariq majeed; zhiyuan yu; adnan maqbool; mesfin genie; s. ullah; waheed ahmad environmental science and pollution research , 28, 41912–41921 · published other applied economics journal article"}
#### [The Trade-off between Economic Growth and Environmental Quality: Does Economic Freedom Asymmetry Matter for Pakistan?](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11356-021-13709-9){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Muhammad Tariq Majeed; Zhiyuan Yu; Adnan Maqbool; **Mesfin Genie**; S. Ullah; Waheed Ahmad</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Environmental Science and Pollution Research* , 28, 41912–41921 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11356-021-13709-9){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2021" data-type="journal" data-search="2021 weighting or aggregating? investigating information processing in multi-attribute choices mesfin g. genie; nicolas krucien; mandy ryan health economics , 30, 1291–1305 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Weighting or Aggregating? Investigating Information Processing in Multi-attribute Choices](https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.4245){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Nicolas Krucien; Mandy Ryan</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Economics* , 30, 1291–1305 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.4245){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2021" data-type="journal" data-search="2021 metastatic prostate cancer men’s attitudes towards treatment of the local tumour and metastasis evaluative research (ip5-matter): protocol for a prospective, multicentre discrete choice experiment study martin j. connor; mesfin g. genie; michael gonzalez; n. sarwar; k. t. jayaprakash; g. horan; f. hosking-jervis; n. klimowska-nassar; j. sukumar; t. pokrovska; d. basak; a. robinson; m. beresford; b. rai; s. mangar; v. khoo; t. dudderidge; a. falconer; m. winkler; verity watson; hashim u. ahmed bmj open , 11, e048996 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [Metastatic Prostate Cancer Men’s Attitudes towards Treatment of the Local Tumour and Metastasis Evaluative Research (IP5-MATTER): Protocol for a Prospective, Multicentre Discrete Choice Experiment Study](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2021-048996){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Martin J. Connor; **Mesfin G. Genie**; Michael Gonzalez; N. Sarwar; K. T. Jayaprakash; G. Horan; F. Hosking-Jervis; N. Klimowska-Nassar; J. Sukumar; T. Pokrovska; D. Basak; A. Robinson; M. Beresford; B. Rai; S. Mangar; V. Khoo; T. Dudderidge; A. Falconer; M. Winkler; Verity Watson; Hashim U. Ahmed</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*BMJ Open* , 11, e048996 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2021-048996){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2020"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2020
<span>3 articles</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2020" data-type="journal" data-search="2020 the role of heterogeneity of patients’ preferences in kidney transplantation mesfin g. genie; antonio nicolò; giacomo pasini journal of health economics , 72, 102331 · published preferences &amp; choice journal article"}
#### [The Role of Heterogeneity of Patients’ Preferences in Kidney Transplantation](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhealeco.2020.102331){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Antonio Nicolò; Giacomo Pasini</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Journal of Health Economics* , 72, 102331 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhealeco.2020.102331){.pub-link target="_blank"} · [Earlier version ↗](https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.3428620){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2020" data-type="journal" data-search="2020 understanding public preferences and trade-offs for government responses during a pandemic: a protocol for a discrete choice experiment in the uk mesfin g. genie; luis e. loría-rebolledo; shantini paranjothy; daniel powell; mandy ryan; ruben a. sakowsky; verity watson bmj open , 10, e043477 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [Understanding Public Preferences and Trade-offs for Government Responses during a Pandemic: A Protocol for a Discrete Choice Experiment in the UK](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2020-043477){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin G. Genie**; Luis E. Loría-Rebolledo; Shantini Paranjothy; Daniel Powell; Mandy Ryan; Ruben A. Sakowsky; Verity Watson</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*BMJ Open* , 10, e043477 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2020-043477){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2020" data-type="journal" data-search="2020 the covid-19 pandemic in italy: policy and technology impact on health and non-health outcomes chiara berardi; marcello antonini; mesfin g. genie; g. cotugno; a. lanteri; adrian melia; francesco paolucci health policy and technology , 9, 454–487 · published public health policy journal article"}
#### [The COVID-19 Pandemic in Italy: Policy and Technology Impact on Health and Non-health Outcomes](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2020.08.019){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Chiara Berardi; Marcello Antonini; **Mesfin G. Genie**; G. Cotugno; A. Lanteri; Adrian Melia; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Health Policy and Technology* , 9, 454–487 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2020.08.019){.pub-link target="_blank"} · [Earlier version ↗](https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.3680293){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.publication-type-section data-publication-section="working"}
## Working papers

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2025"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2025
<span>1 output</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2025" data-type="working" data-search="2025 vaccinating now or vaccinating later: separating pull-forward and net effects using a dynamic regression discontinuity design fabio i. martinenghi; mesfin genie; katie attwell; huong le; hannah c. moore; aregawi g. gebremariam; bette liu; francesco paolucci; christopher c. blyth arxiv · working paper public health policy working paper"}
#### [Vaccinating Now or Vaccinating Later: Separating Pull-Forward and Net Effects Using a Dynamic Regression Discontinuity Design](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2509.22714){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Fabio I. Martinenghi; **Mesfin Genie**; Katie Attwell; Huong Le; Hannah C. Moore; Aregawi G. Gebremariam; Bette Liu; Francesco Paolucci; Christopher C. Blyth</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*arXiv* · <span class="status">Working paper</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2509.22714){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2018"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2018
<span>1 output</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="preference" data-year="2018" data-type="working" data-search="2018 does cognitive ability affect choice consistency? mesfin genie ssrn electronic journal · working paper preferences &amp; choice working paper"}
#### [Does Cognitive Ability Affect Choice Consistency?](https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.3270180){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin Genie**</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*SSRN Electronic Journal* · <span class="status">Working paper</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.3270180){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.publication-type-section data-publication-section="chapter"}
## Book chapter

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2025"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2025
<span>1 output</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="public-health" data-year="2025" data-type="chapter" data-search="2025 telehealth evolution and policy response in australia: insights from the covid-19 pandemic stefano bruzzo-gallardo; mesfin genie; r. gallagher; francesco paolucci information technologies in the healthcare industry , 561–592 · published public health policy book chapter"}
#### [Telehealth Evolution and Policy Response in Australia: Insights from the COVID-19 Pandemic](https://doi.org/10.1016/B978-0-443-30168-1.00002-5){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">Stefano Bruzzo-Gallardo; **Mesfin Genie**; R. Gallagher; Francesco Paolucci</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Information Technologies in the Healthcare Industry* , 561–592 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/B978-0-443-30168-1.00002-5){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.publication-type-section data-publication-section="data"}
## Data outputs

::: {.publication-year-section data-year-group="2019"}
::: {.year-heading}
### 2019
<span>2 outputs</span>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="other" data-year="2019" data-type="data" data-search="2019 combining the retrospective interviews of wave 3 and wave 7: the third release of the share job episodes panel mesfin genie survey of health, ageing and retirement in europe · published dataset other applied economics data output"}
#### Combining the Retrospective Interviews of Wave 3 and Wave 7: The Third Release of the SHARE Job Episodes Panel

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin Genie**</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe* · <span class="status">Published data</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[University record ↗](https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie#publications){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::

::: {.publication-record data-field="other" data-year="2019" data-type="data" data-search="2019 share job episodes panel mesfin genie survey of health, ageing and retirement in europe · published data product other applied economics data output"}
#### [SHARE Job Episodes Panel](https://doi.org/10.6103/SHARE.jep.800){target="_blank"}

<div class="publication-authors">**Mesfin Genie**</div>

<div class="publication-meta">*Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe* · <span class="status">Published data</span></div>

<div class="publication-links">[DOI ↗](https://doi.org/10.6103/SHARE.jep.800){.pub-link target="_blank"}</div>
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
